title: What did the man in this story do?

meanings.usage: 指从交通工具上卸下货物，与load（装载）相对
由名词wood + en构成，表示材质
用于强调程度，相当于very much，但语气更强
常用于It occurred to sb that...句型，表示某人突然想起
指发现原本存在但未被知晓的事物或情况
常与to连用，表示被困在狭小空间
后接名词或动名词，表示承认某事
指依法拘留犯罪嫌疑人
account for表示解释原因或占据（数量比例）
a pile of表示一堆，可用于实物或抽象概念
be ordered to do sth表示被命令做某事
指符合常规的或标准的
指商品或服务的价格，常与high/low搭配
指短途旅行或行程，也可指旅途

phrases.usage: 开始做某事，表示动作的开始

examples.en: Workers began to unload the boxes.

phrases.usage: 许多；若干，后接可数名词复数

examples.en: A number of wooden boxes contained clothing.

phrases.phrase: It occurred to sb to do sth

examples.en: It occurred to one of the workers to open up the box.
examples.zh: 其中一个工人突然想起要打开箱子。

examples.en: He was astonished at what he found.
examples.zh: 他对发现的东西感到非常惊讶。

phrases.usage: 试图/企图做某事（但未必成功）

examples.en: He did not even try to run away.
The boy ran away from home.
examples.zh: 那个男孩从家里逃跑了。

examples.en: The man was ordered to pay £3,500.
examples.zh: 那个男子被要求支付3500英镑。

examples.en: He was ordered to pay for the cost of the trip.
examples.zh: 他被要求支付旅途费用。

examples.en: A man was lying on top of a pile of woollen goods.
examples.zh: 一名男子躺在羊毛制品堆的上面。

examples.en: He hid in the box before the plane left London.
examples.zh: 他在飞机离开伦敦之前藏进了箱子里。

grammar.title: 过去进行时 (Past Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时刻或某一段时间正在进行的动作
grammar.usage: 描述故事发生的背景或正在进行的动作，常与when/while连用

examples.en: Workers were unloading wooden boxes when they found the heavy box.
examples.zh: 工人们正在卸木箱时，发现了那个很重的箱子。

examples.en: The man was hiding in the box when the plane arrived.
examples.zh: 飞机到达时，那个男子正藏在箱子里。

grammar.title: 过去完成时 (Past Perfect Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示在过去某一时间之前已经完成的动作，即"过去的过去"
grammar.structure: 主语 + had + 过去分词
grammar.usage: 用于过去完成时的动作发生在另一个过去动作之前，常与before/after连用

examples.en: The man admitted hiding in the box before the plane left London.
examples.zh: 那个人承认在飞机离开伦敦之前就藏进了箱子里。

examples.en: He had been confined to the box for over eighteen hours.
examples.zh: 他已经被关在箱子里超过十八个小时了。

grammar.title: 过去完成进行时 (Past Perfect Continuous Tense)
grammar.definition: 表示过去某一时间之前一直在进行的动作
grammar.structure: 主语 + had been + 动词-ing
grammar.usage: 强调动作的持续性和持续时间

examples.en: He had been waiting for over eighteen hours.
examples.zh: 他已经等了超过十八个小时。

examples.en: The plane had been flying for ten hours before it arrived.
examples.zh: 飞机到达前已经飞了十个小时。

sentencePatterns.pattern: No one could account for the fact that...

original.en: No one could account for the fact that one of the boxes was extremely heavy.
original.zh: 没有人能解释其中一个箱子特别重这一事实。

imitations.en: No one could account for the fact that he was late.
imitations.zh: 没有人能解释他迟到的原因。

imitations.en: No one could account for the fact that the door was open.
imitations.zh: 没有人能解释门为什么开着。

sentencePatterns.pattern: It occurred to sb to do sth

original.en: It suddenly occurred to one of the workers to open up the box.
original.zh: 其中一个工人突然想起要打开箱子。

imitations.en: It occurred to me to call my mother.
imitations.zh: 我突然想起要给我妈妈打电话。

imitations.en: It occurred to him to ask for help.
imitations.zh: 他突然想起要请求帮助。

original.en: The man was ordered to pay £3,500 for the cost of the trip.
original.zh: 那名男子被要求支付3500英镑的旅途费用。

imitations.en: He was ordered to leave the room.
The students were ordered to finish the test in one hour.
imitations.zh: 学生们被要求在一小时内完成考试。

sentencePatterns.pattern: 主语 + had been + 动词-ing + for/over + 时间段

original.en: He had been confined to the wooden box for over eighteen hours.
original.zh: 他已经被关在木箱里超过十八个小时了。

imitations.en: She had been waiting for over two hours.
imitations.zh: 她已经等了两个多小时。

imitations.en: They had been working for over ten hours.
imitations.zh: 他们已经工作了十多个小时。
